---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve? Who has it?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why they're worse.

**Project-invariant check**
- [ ] This feature requires no network communication (or is strictly opt-in and justified).
- [ ] Failure modes of this feature fail *safe* (locked), never open.
